by Sophia Knapp

Dolce Flor Bakery

Gluten free · Made with organic ingredients · Tree nut free · Sesame free · Made to order

Every cake is hand-crafted to order using organic ingredients — gluten free, tree nut free, and sesame free.
Choose from our signature cakes, specialty flavors, or other desserts.

by Sophia Knapp

Our Signature Cakes

All cakes are 6-inch, gluten free and made with organic ingredients

Classic Vanilla

A tender, fragrant vanilla sponge made with real Madagascar vanilla bean — light, delicate, and endlessly comforting.

6-inch

Dark Chocolate

Rich, deeply indulgent chocolate cake crafted with organic cacao. Moist and velvety with a complex depth of flavor.

6-inch

Red Velvet

The beloved Southern classic reimagined gluten-free. A stunning crimson crumb with a subtle cocoa kiss and a silky, slight tang.

6-inch

by Sophia Knapp

Specialty Cakes

Crafted with signature flavor combinations — all 6-inch, gluten free and organic

Tiramisu Cake

Vanilla cake infused with cocoa and fresh brewed espresso, layered with vanilla pastry cream and whipped mascarpone cream cheese.

6-inch

Mocha Cake

Vanilla cake infused with fresh brewed espresso, layered with chocolate pastry cream and whipped mascarpone cream cheese.

6-inch

Strawberry Shortcake

Vanilla cake layered with vanilla pastry cream, strawberry compote, and whipped mascarpone cream cheese.

6-inch

Sweet Cookie Crumble

Vanilla cake layered with whipped cream cheese frosting and cookie crumbs — a dreamy, textured treat in every bite.

6-inch

by Sophia Knapp

Cake Size

All cakes are available in two sizes

6-Inch Round Cake

Our classic size — serves 8-10 people.

8-Inch Heart Cake

A beautiful heart shape — serves 8-10 people.
